subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed rollout bypasses mandatory 48-hour staging validation (POL-601) and lacks evidence of change board approval and monitoring setup (POL-602). Rollback/traffic monitoring posture under POL-603 is unverified.
applied_constraints: Complete minimum 48-hour staging validation per POL-601
Obtain change board approval and configure post-deployment monitoring per POL-602
Demonstrate automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring per POL-603
